L1.area: Spreadsheet file parsing and data extraction logic

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) and XML Entity Expansion vulnerability exists where the XML parser used during spreadsheet processing does not disable doctype declarations, external entity resolution, or entity reference expansion. A crafted input file could trigger XML entity expansion, leading to denial of service, information disclosure, or server-side request forgery.

L3.area: XML document parsing and transformation utilities within the spreadsheet streaming library
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) and XML Entity Expansion vulnerability exists in the DOM-based XML parser used to process OOXML spreadsheet content. The parser does not disable doctype declarations, external entity resolution, or entity reference expansion. A crafted .xlsx file could trigger XML entity expansion, leading to denial of service, information disclosure, or server-side request forgery.

ground_truth.reason: The XML parser in the document utility method creates a DocumentBuilderFactory without disabling external entity resolution or doctype declarations, allowing XML Entity Expansion and XXE attacks via crafted spreadsheet files.
